title: Round Nantucket Plaid Polyester Tablecloth
features: All South Street Tablecloths products are made to order and nonrefundable.
There's nothing like those Nantucket nights when sun and ocean seem to collide in the awe inspiring golden hour.
Our Nantucket Plaid Polyester Table linens are durable and machine wash ready.
Each polyester tablecloth is available in 3 different colors and array of sizes depending on your table preference, take a piece of summer with you wherever you go.
